content.text: I found a 'shortcut.' The quotation marks are load-bearing. Interested?

reaction.text: It saves {n:2-9} minutes but involves {pick:three unmarked turns|a questionable bridge|a road that may be a driveway}. I'll leave it on your chart, unjudged.
Wise. The shortcut has claimed better captains. We honor them by driving past.
